retry_reason: Failure (NULL return) means the inode is not yet watched; the caller may retry if a watch is expected to be created later.
contract_summary: Find-and-get wrapper: returns a pointer to an audit_parent with an acquired reference (via fsnotify_find_inode_mark). The caller is responsible for releasing the reference with a corresponding put (e.g., audit_put_parent) when the parent is no longer needed. The function only succeeds if the inode already has an associated audit watch; if no watch exists, NULL is returned and no reference is taken.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to look up an audit_parent via its fsnotify_mark and acquire a reference on it; no additional logic besides the container_of conversion.
judge.retry_reason: Failure (NULL return) means the inode is not yet watched; the caller may retry if a watch is expected to be created later.

check.reason: fsnotify_find_inode_mark increments the refcount on the returned fsnotify_mark via mark.refcnt.refs. The function returns an audit_parent pointer that contains that mark via container_of. The access path from return value to refcount field is parent.mark.refcnt.refs with type chain audit_parent--fsnotify_mark--refcount_struct--atomic_t, which matches the callee's get operation on index 0 and the code structure.
